issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (checking if you have 2 or less Life cards), not 'TurnCount'. TurnCount is for game turn tracking, not Life card count.
Condition structure is wrong. Should check current Life count (<=2), not turn count. Correct structure: {"type":"HasAttachedDon","max":2}

Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Card text says 'during this turn' which means the power reduction lasts only while the Counter is resolving/during this turn. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' or 'Permanent' depending on game rules, but 'EndOfTurn' triggers end-of-turn removal, which may not match intent.
Second effect (Trigger with TrashFromHand and FlipLife) has no basis in the card text. This entire effect should be removed—the card only describes the Counter action.
